parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'project',       (SELECT row_to_json(p) FROM projects p WHERE p.id = $1::uuid),
  'client',        (SELECT json_build_object('id', c.id, 'name', c.name, 'email', pii_decrypt(c.email_enc), 'phone', pii_decrypt(c.phone_enc)) FROM clients c WHERE c.id = (SELECT client_id FROM projects WHERE id = $1::uuid)),
  'briefing',      (SELECT row_to_json(b) FROM briefings b WHERE b.project_id = $1::uuid AND b.status='approved' ORDER BY b.version DESC LIMIT 1),
  'design',        (SELECT row_to_json(d) FROM design_options d WHERE d.project_id = $1::uuid AND d.is_selected = true LIMIT 1),
  'cost_estimate', (SELECT row_to_json(ce) FROM cost_estimates ce WHERE ce.project_id = $1::uuid ORDER BY ce.version DESC LIMIT 1),
  'invoices',      (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.invoice_date DESC NULLS LAST) FROM (SELECT id, supplier_name, invoice_date, total_amount, status FROM invoices WHERE project_id = $1::uuid) t),
  'invoices_total',(SELECT COALESCE(round(sum(total_amount)::numeric, 2), 0) FROM invoices WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND status IN ('paid','approved')),
  'permits',       (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, application_type, entity, status, expediente_id FROM permit_applications WHERE project_id = $1::uuid) t),
  'aftercare',     (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, severity, status, category, LEFT(description, 100) AS preview, reported_at FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE project_id = $1::uuid ORDER BY reported_at DESC) t),
  'pathology',     (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, pathology_type, severity, status FROM pathology_findings WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND status NOT IN ('repaired','dismissed')) t),
  'regulatory',    (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, task_type, title, status, priority FROM regulatory_tasks WHERE project_id = $1::uuid ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) t),
  'contracts',     (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT id, contract_type, status, signed_at, expires_at FROM contracts WHERE project_id = $1::uuid ORDER BY created_at DESC) t),
  'agent_executions_total', (SELECT count(*) FROM agent_executions WHERE project_id = $1::uuid),
  'agent_executions_failed',(SELECT count(*) FROM agent_executions WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND status='failed'),
  'llm_cost_total', COALESCE(round((SELECT sum(cost_usd) FROM llm_calls WHERE project_id = $1::uuid)::numeric, 4), 0),
  'llm_calls_total', (SELECT count(*) FROM llm_calls WHERE project_id = $1::uuid),
  'tokens_active', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())),
  'consultations_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM consultation_queue WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND status='pending'),
  'notes', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.pinned DESC, t.created_at DESC) FROM (SELECT id, body, category, pinned, created_at FROM project_notes WHERE project_id = $1::uuid) t)
) AS snapshot;
